Cocaine Bear (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $64,670,240Details
International Box Office $25,296,333
Worldwide Box Office $89,966,573
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,105,771
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,030,419
Total $3,136,190
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Inspired by the 1985 true story of a drug runner's plane crash, missing cocaine, and the black bear that ate it, this wild thriller finds an oddball group of cops, criminals, tourists and teens converging in a Georgia forest where a 500- pound apex predator has ingested a staggering amount of cocaine and gone on a coke-fueled rampage for more blow … and blood.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,260,790 (36.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.78 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:71.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,534 opening theaters/3,571 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $70,699,818

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 24th, 2023 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: February 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Slovenia)
February 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
February 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Egypt)
February 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Sweden)
February 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (Saudi Arabia)
Video Release: March 14th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for bloody violence and gore, drug content and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2759 (Cert #54139), 11/23/2022)
Running Time: 91 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Posthumous Release
Filming location (country): Ireland
Geographical setting: Kentucky, United States
Plot point: Animals Gone Bad, Drug Trafficking
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Brownstone, Universal Pictures, Lord Miller, Jurassic Party Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
